speaker: speaker1
text: I was wondering if you could help me with something .

speaker: speaker1
text: Actually , it ’ s a little bit silly .

speaker: speaker2
text: Don ’ t worry about it , just ask .

speaker: speaker1
text: What words do I need to know to buy a pair of shoes ?

speaker: speaker2
text: You need to know the type of shoes you want .

speaker: speaker1
text: Don ’ t worry about that . I can point it out in the store .

speaker: speaker2
text: The shoes can be comfortable or not comfortable , too wide , too narrow , or just right ; and long or short . In girls shoes , the heel can be high or low .

speaker: speaker1
text: Let me write all that down . I ’ m going shopping this afternoon .
